name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Canton, OH's Cash America Pawn at 3040 Cleveland Ave NW offers quick pawn loans and sales on jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn in Canton, OH is located at 3040 Cleveland Ave NW as a standalone pawn shop serving the local community. The Canton location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 5 PM, making it convenient for working professionals and weekend shoppers. This Canton branch provides quick, judgment-free transactions in a professional environment.

This Cash America Pawn location buys, sells, and provides loans on jewelry, watches, electronics, designer handbags, musical instruments, and collectibles. Customers can call +1 330-493-7452 to ask about current inventory, get instant quotes on items, or learn more about the terms of pawn loans. The staff at this shop specializes in fair valuations and transparent terms, ensuring you understand exactly what you'll receive.

If you need quick cash in Canton, OH, a pawn loan at this location can be faster than traditional loans and doesn't require a credit check. Bring a valid photo ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell, and the staff will provide an immediate assessment. Whether you're looking to unlock value from items you no longer need or seeking emergency funds, Cash America Pawn offers a straightforward alternative to conventional lending.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America—largest international pawn chain
Same-day cash pawn loans with no credit check required
Non-recourse loans: cannot be pursued for deficiency if pledged items are sold
Buys gold, silver, and platinum on the spot for immediate cash
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment alternative to credit
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) provides corporate stability
AFF subsidiary offers lease-to-own options through 15,000+ retail merchant partners
cons: Interest rates, fees, and loan terms not disclosed on website—cost opacity makes comparison difficult
Risk of losing personal property of sentimental or practical value if unable to repay loan
Pawn loans are inherently high-cost borrowing compared to personal loans or credit union alternatives
Inventory of retail merchandise varies by location and is unpredictable
No information provided about loan amounts, repayment periods, or renewal/extension terms
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who lack access to traditional credit or credit union services
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools) they can pledge as collateral
Individuals seeking short-term loans without credit checks or underwriting delays
Those preferring layaway purchases over credit cards or traditional financing
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with immediate borrowing needs who own valuable personal property and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-cost borrowing—while faster and easier than traditional loans, they carry significant risk of losing pledged items and lack cost transparency on the website regarding interest rates and fees.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying and sale
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary network
Personal property appraisal and cash offers
Item buy-back options for pawned goods
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 3040 Cleveland Ave NW, Canton, OH. Quick pawn loans, sales, and fair valuations on jewelry and electronics.
